---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for HotMarks
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include examples of how the feature would work with HotMarks semantic formatting (e.g., **bold** directives, __underline__ emphasis).

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or references relevant to the request.
